LanguageData.AH_RegisterAnimalsDesc: Send animals from this caravan to {0}. Production begins once both a male and a female (or two of a genderless species) have arrived.
LanguageData.AH_RegisterDesc: Send individual animals to stock this settlement. A species needs a male and a female (or two of a genderless species) before it can produce.
LanguageData.AH_FishUnavailable: No fish here (needs a coast, river, or lakeshore in a biome with fish)
LanguageData.AH_BasicAnimalsEnabled: Basic farm animals available at all settlements
LanguageData.AH_BasicAnimalsEnabledDesc: When enabled, basic farm animals (Chicken, Cow, Pig, Sheep, Goat) are available at all settlements without needing to send breeding pairs.
LanguageData.AH_RestrictFishToWaterDesc: When enabled (Odyssey only), settlements produce only the fish their biome offers for the water their tile touches: coastal settlements get saltwater fish, river or lakeshore settlements get freshwater fish. A water-adjacent settlement yields fish even with no registered livestock; land animal products still need breeding pairs.
LanguageData.AH_RestrictMercAnimalsToStocked: Restrict merc animals to stocked species
LanguageData.AH_RestrictMercAnimalsToStockedDesc: When enabled, the military unit designer's animal and mount pickers only offer animals that at least one settlement in the Empire has stocked (registered breeding pairs, plus basic animals and Cloning Lab-shared species). Disable to choose from every animal, as in the base mod.
